title: Iteration Plan
user_request: Implement the slot-based governance artifact workflow so fixed template content is rendered by deterministic scripts, while agents provide only variable slots and small update patches. Start with ITERATION_PLAN and preserve support for updating a plan during task execution.
existing_behavior: Agents currently create or update tasks/<date>-<slug>/ITERATION_PLAN.md directly from a Markdown template.
Fixed headings, tables, default copy, and empty rows are repeatedly generated by the model.
context-indexer indexes task Markdown files as ordinary task history, so generated template text can be treated as meaningful context.
Deterministic scripts already live in tools/ and skills/*/scripts/, use the Python standard library, and expose stable JSON output contracts.

reuse_patterns.reuse: Add stdlib-only render/update scripts with JSON input and JSON output.
Keep human-readable Markdown shape compatible with the existing task artifact.
Detect generated Markdown and index source slots instead of fixed template text.
Add focused unittest coverage for rendering, patching, and indexing.

files_not_to_change: Existing historical task artifacts outside this task directory
tools/init_project.py copied path behavior unless required by tests

new_files.why: Existing scripts do not render task artifacts from structured slots.
Existing scripts do not apply small plan update operations with revision checks.
Existing Markdown templates do not define machine-readable template IDs or renderer metadata.
Slot payload shape needs a durable public contract.
Existing tests do not cover slot rendering or patch updates.
This task should exercise the new slot-based plan source.
Quality gate needs a durable task-local evidence input.
Quality gate result should be reviewable with the task evidence.

risks.text: Treating generated Markdown differently in the indexer can hide useful task history if source slots are missing.
risks.status: mitigated by falling back to Markdown text when the source slot file is missing

risks.text: JSON update operations that address array indexes directly can drift.
Adding generated artifact contracts changes public helper behavior and must be documented in API contracts.
risks.status: mitigated by API contract and README updates

rollback: Remove the new renderer/update scripts, artifact template metadata, focused tests, generated plan slots, and the context-indexer generated Markdown special case. Restore iteration-planner documentation to direct Markdown creation.

revision_history.reason: Final verification added quality-gate evidence artifacts.
